entry.title: Re: Initial Configurations for ABAP in the Cloud - Cloud Foundry Environment

While I am login BTP Trial Account it shows me the message "Cannot connect to the Service Instance. The service is currently not available." 

Please help me on this

entry.title: Re: Correct way to provision the destination for calling LLMs from SAP CAP applications GenAI Hub?
entry.content:
Thanks Akash, I was missing the trailing `/oauth/token` in the tokenServiceURL.

However, I am now getting a new error, it seems there are some extra axios headers being added to the request. Have you seen this error before? For reference, the final POST request should align to this specification: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/consume-generative-ai-models-using-sap-ai-core#aws-bedrock

 

[odata] - GET /odata/v4/invokebedrock/invoke() 
[cds] - connect to cap-llm-plugin > cap-llm-plugin/srv/cap-llm-plugin.js 
[cds] - connect to GenAIHubDestination > rest { destination: 'ai_core_dest_4hybridmode', requestTimeout: '300000' }

[remote] - Error: Error during request to remote service: Request failed with status code 400
    at run (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:238:31)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async RemoteService.on_handler (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:274:20)
    at async next (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async RemoteService.handle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
    at async RemoteService.handle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:286:16)
    at async CAPLLMPlugin.getChatCompletionWithConfig (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/cap-llm-plugin/srv/cap-llm-plugin.js:257:24)
    at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/srv/invoke-service.js:35:26)
    at async next (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async ApplicationService.handle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:67:10) {
  statusCode: 502,
  reason: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 400
      at settle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/axios/dist/node/axios.cjs:2019:12)
      at IncomingMessage.handleStreamEnd (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/axios/dist/node/axios.cjs:3135:11)
      at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:523:35)
      at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1367:12)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:82:21)
      at Axios.request (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/axios/dist/node/axios.cjs:4287:41)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
      at async run (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:227:16)
      at async RemoteService.on_handler (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:274:20)
      at async next (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
      at async RemoteService.handle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
      at async RemoteService.handle (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:286:16)
      at async CAPLLMPlugin.getChatCompletionWithConfig (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/cap-llm-plugin/srv/cap-llm-plugin.js:257:24)
      at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/srv/invoke-service.js:35:26)
      at async next (/workspaces/capb2b/cap-llm-invoke/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:69:17) {
    message: 'Error during request to remote service: Request failed with status code 400',
    code: 'ERR_BAD_REQUEST',
    config: {
      timeout: 0,
      xsrfCookieName: 'XSRF-TOKEN',
      xsrfHeaderName: 'X-XSRF-TOKEN',
      maxContentLength: -1,
      maxBodyLength: -1,
      method: 'post',
      baseURL: 'https://api.ai.prod.us-east-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com',
      proxy: false,
      url: '/v2/inference/deployments/de2a54b845f0797b/invoke',
      data: '{"anthropic_version":"bedrock-2023-05-31","max_tokens":512,"messages":{"role":"user","content":"Hello, Claude"}}'
    },
    request: {
      method: 'POST',
      url: 'https://api.ai.prod.us-east-1.aws.ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2/inference/deployments/d.....97b/invoke',
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]]
    },
    response: {
      status: 400,
      statusText: 'Bad Request',
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]],
      body: [Object]
    },
    status: 400,
    correlationId: 'e0f56b9b-54b5-4c06-adc0-4c98a29fe6b9',
    toJSON: [Function (anonymous)]
  }
}

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 07 Now Available – The Latest and Greatest on Empowering Everyone with Data
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Thanks for the sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

 

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional data replication with SDI
entry.content:
Hi Christian,

SDI does support replication to different target.
For example:
1. Setup DP agent connect to HANA A
2. In HANA A, create two remote sources to connect to HANA B, C
3. Create VT table connect to HANA B, C.(VT_B, VT_C)
4. Setup replication task/flowgraph to do replication from VT_B to VT_C
So you can see in the example above, use VT table as target in your replication, then you can move data to target other than the current hana system.

But keep in mind, performance to other target is not good. But we do provide such function.
In your case. If both the source and target are HANA database, my suggestion is you setup two setup SDI.
Two dp agent connection to two HAHA, within each other setup remote source to connect to the other to replicate data.

Best regads
Helen

entry.title: Re: OOPS! we faced an issue processing your request in DM...
entry.content:
Hi Boopalan,

try this in your postman

{
  "repository": {
        "displayName": "dispname",
        "description": "name repository",
        "repositoryType": "internal",
        "isVersionEnabled":"false",
        "isVirusScanEnabled":"false",
        "skipVirusScanForLargeFile": "false",
        "hashAlgorithms":"SHA-256"
  }
}

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Access Denied
entry.content:
In my BTP Trail account, through the booster I have setup the SAP Build apps and activated User account also. But when I opened the SAP Build apps its saying access denied. 

Please help me to fix this issue.

entry.title: Re: writing in same table without locking it
entry.content:
Hi
if you know the row that has to be updated lock it before the calculation starts by updating a column. Another connection can't update until you committed (or rollbacked) the first transaction and will wait.

Regards
Arthur

entry.title: Connection ECC to CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working on a project that requires sending data (CSV) from ECC to SFTP server through CPI.

I have configured the destination in SM59 as follows:

  • Connection Type: G
  • Target URL: CPI endpoint and prefix
  • Logon & Security:
    • User: Client ID
    • Password: Client Secret
    • SSL Certificate: Default SSL Client (I have also imported the SSL certificate into STRUST)

However, when I test the connection, a prompt appears (screenshot attached) asking for a username and password. I have tried various credentials, including:

  • CPI user/password
  • Client ID/Client Secret

Unfortunately, all attempts have failed.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? I would greatly appreciate any guidance or suggestions to resolve this.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards

entry.title: In which app can we map GL account to symbolic account in S/4 hana public cloud?
SAP PI Most messages are going into scheduled and few are processing success
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a schenario SOAP to SOAP.

Most of the messages are in scheduled mode and only few are processing successfully.

Even unable to get log in message log for scheduled messages.

The messages which are in scheduled mode they are not going into error and success after few hours also still they are in scheduled mode only.

around 35k messages are in schedule mode they are not going to error and not going to process and unable to see the message log and nothing is there to see after few hours from 35k few are processed and few got failed so finally 25 k messages are in scheduled and they are stuck.

Please suggest.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Dileep

entry.title: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

I received booking submission confirmation mail from training.global@sap.com for CER006 order, but its more than 2 days I have not received any further communications regarding payments so I can schedule my exam, Am I missing any process from my side? Can anyone help me out here? 

Regards,

Vijay Chembun

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Learning Team,

My name is Yazan Albarbarawi. I am writing to express my interest in the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. I am impressed by SAP's dedication to providing opportunities for underrepresented individuals in the technology field.

I am currently looking to switch careers mid-life and am particularly interested in gaining expertise in SAP FICO. However, my financial situation makes it difficult for me to afford the certification exam.

I would like to request the opportunity to take the SAP FICO certification exam free of charge as part of the Digital Skills Initiative. I am fully committed to the learning process and excited about the prospect of becoming SAP-certified.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,
Yazan Omar Albarbarawi

entry.title: Re: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", &quot

entry.title: SAC Data Actions: Calculate Average from Actual & copy to Forecast
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to calculate the average of all uploaded periods in the Actual version and copy it to the remaining months of that year in the Forecast version.

For example, if I have the actual data of the first 7 periods loaded for the year 2024, the data action must calculate its average and copy it to the remaining periods of that year in the Forecast version. i-e The average of the seven months should be copied to (Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, DEC) of the Forecast version of the same year.

Would appreciate support from the gurus...

entry.title: Optimized Approach to Count Empty Cells in Each Column of a Large Table in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need to count the number of empty cells in each column of a table (e.g., a table with 3 columns and 3 records) and display the results in a work area with the table structure. However, the challenge I’m facing is that my production system contains a massive database with 300 crore (3 billion) records. Using SELECT COUNT(*) for each column separately causes severe performance degradation.

What I've Tried:

I have tried using separate SELECT COUNT(*) queries for each of the 3 columns. For example, for 3 columns, I’m running 3 queries like this:

 

The Question:

Is there a more efficient way to count the number of empty cells in each column of a large table without degrading performance? I want to avoid running multiple queries and ideally execute everything in a single query or optimized batch. Also, I need to store the results in a work area with the table structure so I can easily display the counts for each column.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Is it truly a limi...
entry.content: Yes, I am loading data for only one hierarchy. The details about this limitation are quite unclear. In my experience, I discovered that this limitation does not actually apply.

entry.title: LSMW dosn't work for FIBPU(intermediary bank) for vendor with more than one bank key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm on S4HANA Release 1809, I need to add intermediary bank for 200 vendors, and I'm using tcode FIBPU.

Whene recording the lsmw, these are the steps (see attached steps and error message) :

Step 1 : I enter the vendor number and execute.

Step 2 : The system display the different bank keys available for the entered vendor, I should select the concerned bank key : I set a filter on the bank key and double click on the good bank key.
Step 3 : I enter my sender bank criteria. 

The issue is that when executing the LSMW in foreground, it seems that it's not able to set the filter and remember correctly the selected value in the next screen : 

Error message : Error message 00344 : No batch input data for dypro SAP MSSY0 0120

Any idea on how to solve this please ? thank you!

Thank you for your help!

I hope you are all fine. I am new in SAP and in warehouse management. I would like to clean the LL01 as you can see attached below .. 

For those that are green, i have proceed with the cleaning, but those which remains red i dont know how to clean them. Can you give me any advise please?? 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Exploring SAP CPQ - Quotes APIs - Build your own integration for reporting
entry.content:
Dear All,

SAP Configure, Price, Quote (CPQ) is a powerful tool that helps businesses streamline their sales processes by automating the configuration, pricing, and quoting of products and services. One of the key features of SAP CPQ is its Quotes APIs, which allow for seamless integration with other systems and enhance the overall functionality of the CPQ solution. In this blog, we'll dive into the pros and cons of using SAP CPQ Quotes APIs.

SAP CPQ doesn't have integration with SAP Analytics Cloud(SAC) or any other reporting tools as standard reporting capabilities for sales processes and many customers are demanding & looking for the solutions as out of the box feature

What are SAP CPQ Quotes APIs?

SAP CPQ Quotes APIs are a set of RESTful APIs that enable developers to interact with the CPQ system programmatically. These APIs allow for the creation, retrieval, updating, and deletion of quotes, making it easier to integrate CPQ functionalities with other enterprise systems such as CRM, ERP, and e-commerce platforms.

  1. Seamless Integration:

    • Flexibility: The APIs provide a flexible way to integrate SAP CPQ with various systems, ensuring that data flows smoothly between different applications.
    • Real-time Data: By using APIs, businesses can ensure that their sales teams have access to real-time data, improving decision-making and customer satisfaction.

  2. Automation and Efficiency:

    • Reduced Manual Effort: Automating the quoting process reduces the need for manual data entry, minimizing errors and saving time.
    • Streamlined Workflows: APIs enable the creation of automated workflows that can handle complex pricing and configuration rules, leading to faster quote generation.

  3. Customization and Scalability:

    • Tailored Solutions: Businesses can customize the CPQ solution to meet their specific needs by leveraging the APIs.
    • Scalability: As the business grows, the APIs can handle increased data volumes and more complex configurations without compromising performance.

All the details are updated in below repo on how you can trigger the APIs

https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/SAP-CPQ/tree/main/APIs 

 

 

new_url = https://XXXX.cpq.cloud.sap
@username = 
@password =

###  Password Grant API Authentication
#  login
POST {{new_url}}/oauth2/token
Content-Type: application/json;charset=UTF-8

grant_type=password&username={{username}}&password={{password}}&scope=configurations_admin

@accessToken = {{login.response.body.access_token}}


###  To Create a New quote and copy the quote id from response
POST {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
   "quoteNumber": "3211113213213213",
    "OpportunityId": "985406-3454",
    "OpportunityName": "TestSAP"
}

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes?$top=1000&$skip=0
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

### 
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes?$filter=datecreated eq '2024-04-30'
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes?$filter=(datecreated ge '2024-04-30' and datecreated le '2024-04-30')
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json  

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes?$filter=QuoteId eq '1340'
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/3658
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/3658/items?&$skip=0&$top=1000
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/3658/items?$expand=SelectedAttributes&$expand=PricingConditions&$expand=ExternalConfigurations
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/items/$count
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json
  
###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/productTypes
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/conditions
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/revisions
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/comments
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/actions
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/involvedParties
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/documents
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/approvals
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/approvals/responsibilities
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/v1/quotes/1610/attachments
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 

Watch out for the API's reterival to get first insights

 

Conclusion

SAP CPQ Quotes APIs offer significant benefits in terms of integration, automation, and customization, making them a valuable tool for businesses looking to enhance their sales processes. However, they also come with challenges related to complexity, maintenance, security, and integration. By carefully considering the pros and cons, businesses can make informed decisions about how to best leverage SAP CPQ Quotes APIs to meet their needs.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need further assistance with SAP CPQ or its APIs!

entry.title: Re: Event Mesh - limit of 32767 reached
entry.content:
Hi,

I have question why you using iflow to publish data in event mesh instead of sending directly from Successfactors to Event Mesh?

is it possible to send directly using REST?

thanks,

ebsor

entry.title: Re: How to install & run the ABAP on HANA Sizing Report (SAP Note 1872170) - A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content: Very useful post. Thank you !

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP BTP Destination to SAP CAP using n...
entry.content:
Hi, 

via cds.connect.to you cannot directly connect to a destination, but to a configured service using a destination.
An example configuration inside of a package.json would look like this:

{
  "cds": {
   ...
    "requires": {
      "MY_SERVICE": { 
        "kind": "odata",
        "model": "srv/external/MY_SERVICE"
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "YOUR_DESTINATION"
        }
      } 
    }
  }
}

And then you use it like this:

await cds.connect.to("MY_SERVICE");

For this scenario, you should also include the service definition and make the OData-API fully accessible inside of your app. If you just want to connect to a simple endpoint, you could set the kind to REST and then simply call the API endpoints like a normal HTTP endpoint.

More infos are available in the official documentation: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#using-destinations.

Kind Regards,

Mike

entry.title: Re: unable to enable multiple Adding Field Checks in charm via Focusbuild
entry.content:
Hello, 

I guess you are refering to ChaRM extension: Status Dependent Check Framework to make mandatory, editable fields status dependent in the CRM Web UI
Consistency checks for text fields, business partner, header fields like Description and others.
Make your settings in spro point Status Dependent Check Framework and then add the consistency check /SALM/CONS_CHECK for the transaction type and status in SM34 AIC_SETTINGS2, Assign Consistency Checks
Add Entry:
a. User Status E00XX
b. Sequence: 15 (or any other unused number)
c. Status Transition Consistency Check: /SALM/CONS_CHECK
d. Application Area: /SALM/ITSM_CC
e. Message Number: 001
f. Message Type: A Cancel

Hope this helps,
Dolores

entry.title: How to Merge Dimensions Directly in SAP SAC Story?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

In SAP Web Intelligence (WEBi), we had a very useful feature that allowed us to "merge" identical dimensions at report level.

Is there a way to achieve the same functionality directly within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) stories?

Else, how to handle such scenarios Directly in SAP SAC Story.

entry.title: Re: Become an Expert Peer for SAP Support Programs!
entry.content:
Here’s your message in proper English:

"I have been following your blog and page for the past 3 years, and I recently saw a post you shared about a job opportunity, which was posted around 3 weeks ago. I wanted to inquire whether your company is still accepting applications for the SAP expert roles you mentioned, or if they have already hired experts for the following SAP products in the past 3 weeks:

SAP HANA

SAP Upgrade

SAP Ariba Sourcing Evening

SAP Business Procurement Administration

SAP ERP Finance

SAP SuccessFactors Module Learning"


Let me know if you need further adjustments!

entry.title: Re: Optimized Approach to Count Empty Cells in Each Column of a Large Table in SAP ABAP
entry.content: Please use the buttons "..." and "</>" to display your code nicely, and also to let the people test and fix your code easily. See how to do it here: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-post-code-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684774

entry.title: Re: Optimized Approach to Count Empty Cells in Each Column of a Large Table in SAP ABAP
entry.content: For running only one SQL statement, you may use a UNION if you have ABAP version 7.50 or above, which will output 3 rows (because 3 "unioned" SELECT COUNT); you may define an additional column to indicate the meaning of each row (SELECT 'zonigiri' AS count_type...)

entry.title: Re: SAP PI Most messages are going into scheduled and few are processing success
entry.content: You need to check the dispatcher thread that is responsible for pushing messages to the associated worker thread queues. If that thread crashes you will see this type of behavior. The one other thing to look at is whether messaeges are pushed into an EOIO queue which can also cause the problem if a leading message fails.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Actions: Calculate Average from Actual & cop...
entry.content:
@ShoaibSyed 

not an exact code but you could use #Variable member of date to aggregate the periodic values and then divide by the count of periods. For Actuals you can just blindly aggregate as you forecast periods will not have actuals. Once you have the average you could check if period does not have actuals you could copy the Average.

May the below link could help a bit.

hhttps://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-data-action-advanced-formula-calculate-average-amount-and-percentage-of/qaq-p/12765743

ttps://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-advanced-formula-how-to-calculate-average-of-an-entire-measure-and/qaq-p/12754509

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM...
entry.content: Hello Soren, thanks for replying.. Please see the below screenshot... The transcation doesn't exist.

entry.title: Re: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", &quot
entry.content: hmm "topic" again.

entry.title: Re: Add user on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes you can add a new user to your trial BTP subaccount who is an registered user on SAP BTP.

To create a user, you need to navigate to Security → Users, and choose the Create button in the top-right corner. Enter an user name and email and select an identity provider in the opened dialog and create a user in your BTP trial.

 

You can then provide the necessary roles to the new user to access a service. For more information, please visit the below link:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/add-members-to-your-subaccount

I hope this information is helpful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM...
entry.content: Kantesh, Go to tcode SNRO and insert /SCWM/VASO and there maintain the number range

entry.title: Re: OOPS! we faced an issue processing your request in DM...
entry.content: Hi @Jibin265 Thanks for the patients. I tried this already. It didn't help me. Is that working for you?

entry.title: Capture actual CRM user name in ISU
entry.content:
Experts,

I have a CRM frontend that updates Contract account data in SAP ISU. Whenever posting lock is set on a Contract account from CRM, the same is reflected in CAA3 Tcode in ISU. Also, I can click the posting lock field and see the change log( History of which user changed the data and when). 
Currently, system updates RFC user name in the change log. I see an option in SM59 Tcode - Current user checkbox under logon and security tab. If I enable this checkbox, F1 help for this checkbox says that the actual user name performing the CRM transaction will be captured instead of the RFC user name. 

Question: My client wants to exactly find out who is setting posting lock on Contract accounts. Based on my understanding, I can figure it out in change logs only if I enable this checkbox for the RFC connecting CRM and ISU. 

Are there any downsides or points to take care of while enabling this setting? I have always seen RFC user name used in all my clients and I want your thoughts before enabling this checkbox in the system.

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Delete more than one line at once on a sales order
entry.content:

Maya

entry.title: Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: Hi Sandra,

entry.title: Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: Hi Sandra, Initially, the requirement came up that we have to validate the user login based on shift hours in SAP side. Later we finalized that the user will login in CRM and whenever he tries to access SAP ISU Tcode from within CRM, this validation should happen. Inside CRM, we won't get the top left corner button where the user can click and choose stop transaction. So the current solution to perform the validation using customer exit meets my requirement. Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: Delete more than one line at once on a sales order
entry.content:
hi @joergfrey , 

In the Web client, you can delete multiple lines at once:

For additional information about the web client check out: 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-one-web-client 

and:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_WEB_CLIENT/2554bf7e9aa347729b0547a737e123ac/f85a50072adf432b963eccb603536156.html 

Best regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Crystal report upgrade
entry.content:
Hi SpenceT,

When  upgrading it's always recommended to contact the Third Party and ask them, do not assume they do without asking:

1. Do you support upgrading Crystal Reports to 2016 or 2020?

2. Do you support those versions connecting to "their" data sources?

3. For CR 2016 it's a 32 bit application and for CR 2020 it's a 64 bit application, do "they" support those platforms, mostly database clients.

Go to this link for licensing upgrades for CR Designer:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2015/07/368edae4-597c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

For licensing to connect to their CR Server/BOE servers same questions as above for Server Licenses, they are likely already set up to provide new Licenses for current versions.

Do NOT just upgrade without contacting them first, it could potentially break everything. There will be migration processes you/They will need to do to upgrade to current versions.

PS a quick search on their web site about CR resulted in a few info posts...

https://www.se.com/ca/en/faqs/search/?q=Crystal+reports

Don

entry.title: Re: IDoc Basics For Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Thanks for these well explained information. Expecting more from your side.

Best Regards,

Akshay Anil , ABAP Consultant

entry.title: Re: How to Edit/Trim filename in file receiver channel in SAP PO
entry.content:
Now i am using 1-1 Mapping in ESR so i would like to use UDF to get the required output.

I have tried multiple UDF but i am getting some error while activating the code UDF.

public class RemoveFileNameExtension {
DynamicConfiguration conf1 = (DynamicConfiguration) container.getTransformationParameters().get(StreamTransformationConstants.DYNAMIC_CONFIGURATION);

DynamicConfigurationKey key1 = DynamicConfigurationKey.create( "http:/"+"/sap.com/xi/XI/System/File","FileName");

public String removeExtension(String FileName) throws StreamTransformationException {
if (FileName == null) {
throw new StreamTransformationException("Input Filename is null", null);
}

int index = FileName.indexOf(".xml");
if (index != -1) {
// Extract everything before ".xml"
return FileName.substring(0, index);
}


return FileName;
}
}

Please check this and suggest me where i am missing else please suggest an UDF which can trim the filename as we required.

Actual filename we are getting CAMT0XX_115515XX_3XX634_86530XX7_20241030003216391.xml20241030-013813-047.SNL10248D11730252152604557C

Need the filename as CAMT0XX_115515XX_3XX634_86530XX7_20241030003216391.xml

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports Shows all text compressed
entry.content:
First thing to check and ask yourself is "What Changed"?

Often but not always Microsoft Windows upgrades can "break" CR.

You can check them out in Control Panel\All Control Panel Items\Programs and Features:

before uninstalling ANYTHING check with your IT department, they may have pushed something out you can't change.

I suspect your default Printer changed, open the report in CR Designer and go to File, Page Setup. Depending on what was set, could be Margins, could be Paper Size etc. it could even be a registry key CR uses to set the spacing:

2165260 - List of Registry Keys used in Crystal Reports

Some PDF printers have issues with margins etc. that can affect how CR format's text objects in regards to spacing, formatting for Can Grow etc.

You'll have to do some digging, do all users have the same issue?

entry.title: Embeded PP/DS in SAP Public Cloud Edition 2408

Hi

I would like to know if PP/DS is embedded in SAP Public Cloud Edition 2408 as we are unable to achieve capacity optimisation without aka APO PP/DS. 

I can see Advance Planning option in material master but it is not activated.

Please guide if this feature is available and how to activate advance planning.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Access Denied
entry.content:
Hi,

When you subscribe to the SAP Build Apps service using a booster, a user is created with a Custom Identity Provider and assigned appropriate role collections. During the third step of the booster process, you would have entered your email in the Administrator and Developer input fields. As a result, the BuildApps_Administrator and BuildApps_Developer role collections are assigned to your custom IAS user.

Once Build Apps is successfully subscribed to your subaccount, you can find the subscription in the "Instances and Subscriptions" section. To access Build Apps, log in using your Custom IAS user credentials, which you would have activated via a link sent to your email after running the booster.

To verify the role collections assigned to your Custom IAS user, navigate to the "Users" tab under the "Security" section in the BTP cockpit. Your user should have the BuildApps_Administrator and BuildApps_Developer role collections.

 

For more information, please visit the below help documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/booster-automatic-configuration

I hope this information is helpful.

Thanks.

entry.title: I want to know the detailed step of how to direct live connect sac to sap universe?
entry.content: I have read all the related help and wiki pages, but nothing seems to work for me. I would like to know in detail how to connect SAC with SAP Universe using a direct live connection.

entry.title: Re: ALV cells button Text + Icon
entry.content:
I'm a little bit late here, but I confirm that the style CL_GUI_ALV_GRID=>MC_STYLE_BUTTON supports only either one icon or one text, not both. Here's my test program (play with it and try to find a solution yourself):

REPORT ztest.
TYPES:
  BEGIN OF ts_alv_line,
    button TYPE c LENGTH 40,
    hotspot TYPE c LENGTH 40,
    style  TYPE lvc_t_styl,
  END OF ts_alv_line.
TYPES tt_alv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_alv_line WITH EMPTY KEY.

DATA alv_grid TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid.
DATA gt_alv   TYPE tt_alv.

INCLUDE <cl_alv_control>.

PARAMETERS dummy.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  IF alv_grid IS NOT BOUND.
    DATA(gt_fieldcatalog) = VALUE lvc_t_fcat( ( fieldname = 'BUTTON' )
                                              ( fieldname = 'HOTSPOT' ) ).
    gt_alv = VALUE #( ( button  = '@15\Qtooltip@ text'
                        " button = '@15@text'
                        " button = '@B_EXEC\Qtooltip@text'
                        " button = '@15@'
                        " button = 'text'
                        hotspot = '@15\Qtooltip@ text'
                        style   = VALUE #( ( fieldname = 'BUTTON'  style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_button )
                                           ( fieldname = 'HOTSPOT'
                                             style     = alv_style_align_center_center
                                                         + cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_hotspot ) ) ) ).
    alv_grid = NEW cl_gui_alv_grid( i_parent = cl_gui_container=>screen0 ).
    alv_grid->set_table_for_first_display( EXPORTING  is_layout       = VALUE #( stylefname = 'STYLE'
                                                                                 no_colexpd = abap_true )
                                           CHANGING   it_outtab       = gt_alv
                                                      it_fieldcatalog = gt_fieldcatalog
                                           EXCEPTIONS OTHERS          = 4 ).
  ENDIF.

use the url, client secret and client id for authorization and the emcservice url+/rest/v2/repositories for posting:

But I haven't received any response about the next steps to obtain the free certificate attempt. Could I get some guidance on this, please?

entry.title: Get notified about Apache Camel updates with CPITracker
entry.content:
Many SAP Cloud Integration developers and administrators are keen to know exactly when their tenant is upgraded to the new version of the Apache Camel integration framework (from version 2.24 to version 3.14).

Fortunately, it’s easy to set up CPITracker to notify you when Camel is updated and in this blog post, I will show you how.

In case you are hearing about CPITracker for the first time: CPITracker tracks changes to the various underlying components of SAP Cloud Integration, like Apache Camel, the XSLT processor and the Java runtime. It is implemented as an integration flow and is available for free on GitHub. You can find the instructions here if you’d like to install it in your tenant.

CPITracker runs regularly and uses a handful of different techniques to check the supported components for updates. When it detects them, it passes information about the updates in XML form to an update handler integration flow (explained here) using the ProcessDirect adapter. The update handler — which you develop — then performs whatever actions you want to take, like sending out an email, posting to a Slack channel or something else entirely.

Here is an example of the updates XML document:

(These are real updates that were detected in the trial environment earlier this year.)

Setting up an update handler to only focus on Apache Camel is easy. Here’s one I implemented, that notifies me by email when Apache Camel is updated:

The Router step filters out messages that do not contain an Apache Camel update. This is an implementation of the Message Filter pattern, by the way. The Router step branches on this XPath expression:

/updates/update[characteristic = 'camel.version']

If the updates XML document contains an Apache Camel update, this expression will evaluate to true. The default route goes directly to an End Event.

If an Apache Camel update is present, I extract the relevant information into the following three exchange properties in the "Get update information" Content Modifier step:

NameSource TypeSource ValueData Type
updateDiscoveredXPath/updates/discoveredjava.lang.String
previousCamelVersionXPath/updates/update[characteristic = 'camel.version']/previous-valuejava.lang.String
newCamelVersionXPath/updates/update[characteristic = 'camel.version']/current-valuejava.lang.String

(Please note that the date and time in the updateDiscovered property is in the UTC time zone.)

I then use these properties to compose an email message and finally send off the email. You can, of course, choose to be notified differently. To do so, you simply add the required configuration after the “Get update information” Content Modifier step.

That’s all there is to it. Have fun with CPITracker! If you have any questions or comments feel free to post them below.

},

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Exclude Option
entry.content:
Hi,
hoping that you are doing well. Ist you need to load the excluding values  in an array.then you can try to use setDimensionFilter here is the sample

var excludedValues = ["Value1", "Value2"];
var allowedMembers = [""];

var membersBatch = Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("Item", 1000);

if (membersBatch) {
for (var i = 0; i < membersBatch.length; i++) {
var member = membersBatch[i];

// Check if the member is not in the excluded list
if (excludedValues.indexOf(member.id) === -1) {
allowedMembers.push(member.id);
}
}if (allowedMembers.length > 0) {
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Item",allowedMembers);
} else {
console.log("No allowed members found to apply.");

hoping that this will help you...

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: The ESRS Approach to Double Materiality Assessment
entry.content:
Hi, @sylviaooi , nice article!  I am curious about the overlap between the SAP ESRS Disclosure Management and SAP Sustainability Control Tower.  While SCT seems to be more intuitive for the end user, the functionality like DMA is not available in SCT, an in my view it would be really helpful.  I have not seen it in the SCT roadmap either as of today.

For the purpose of CSRD reporting, would you recommend to go for PAPM ESRS Disclosure Management instead of the requirement from SCT and expanding the delivered datamodel with custom metrics?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Where can I configure the “To-Do Task Reminder” email template from the Manager start page?
entry.content: In the webinars for the release they advised that the email cannot be configured. Hopefully it comes in a future release

entry.title: Allow Version C/D SAP IBP Fiori but remove authorization 'Manage Versions > Delete' in Excel Add-In
entry.content:
Hi fellow experts,

We would like to remove the authorization for users to use the 'Manage Versions' functionality in the Excel Add-In,

because if Deletion is allowed, it could easily give rise to the accidental deletion of for example all Key Figure data from the Baseline.

However, we would like to keep authorization for users to use the Copy Version and Delete Version (for versions other than the Baseline) functionality in Fiori.

I noticed that if we remove authorization for 'VERSION (Version)' via Maintain Business Roles > Maintain Restrictions > Assigned Restriction Types > General > Administration Functions > Write > VERSION

(see 'The following table lists the available values for the restriction field Administration Functions (restriction area General, restriction type Administration Functions):' in SAP IBP Help > Available Restrictions)

Then, the users can also no longer use the Copy Version and Delete Version jobs in Fiori. As mentioned, we would like to keep this functionality such that they can Copy Version from Baseline to an ad-hoc-backup version, before which they should also be able to Delete the ad-hoc-backup version.

Any advice on how to achieve the above authorization?

If impossible to achieve the removal of the 'Manage Versions' in Excel only, how can ensure that a user's authorization allows only:

  • to Copy from and to any version, but not into the Baseline?
  • and more importantly: that the user can not Delete from the Baseline using Delete Version?

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

Regards,

Oscar

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC Access Control – Access Request – User provisioning at item level
entry.content:
Hi Louty.

When an access request is submitted it can be split in multiple paths, depending on your initiator settings.

Provisioning can be configured to happen in the end of the access request (when all these paths get fully approved) or in the end of each of these paths.

In theory you could have provisioning done after the approval of each role if you configure your workflow to generate one path per role. There are some ugly ways to do it, but they would make your workflow configuration very complex.

I would suggest you explore other options that are more suitable for this, like having more than one possible approver, using automatic time-based escalations or rejecting role assignments that go too long without being approved so the approved ones can be provisioned.

entry.title: Re: Access Request : User Provisionning
entry.content:
Hi Louty.

When an access request is submitted it can be split in multiple paths, depending on your initiator settings.

Provisioning can be configured to happen in the end of the access request (when all these paths get fully approved) or in the end of each of these paths.

In this case, you can configure your workflow initiator to trigger a separate path for the request items of type "System", and you can configure this path with a single approval, or even to be automatically approved.

But please note that it will only work if you are adding Systems (not only roles) to your access requests. If user your accounts are getting indirectly created as a result of the role approval it will not work.

entry.title: Re: Identity lifecycle management with SAP BTP and Micros...
entry.content:
Hi

You need to configure the attributes in IAS for the application (look for the app named "SAP BTP Subaccount xxxxx"). For example, If you're using SAML and the standard EntraID names in IAS should look like below: 

The User Name is taken from the Subject name identifier:

If you're using SAML you can use "SAML Tracer" tool. It's available as extension for Chrome/Mozilla for example. You can also check in IAS (Monitoring & Reporting -> Troubleshooting Logs) the OIDC tokens and the details of the attributes being sent.

Using Federation or not depends on what you want to achieve. For some integrations it's recommended or might be required (i.e for SF depending on your EntraID attributes might be required to map the user to a SF Login ID if you're not sending it from your IDP). In general the federation will help you to enrich and play around with attributes from your IDP + Attributes from IAS (if users exist in IAS).

Be aware that SAP is changing some of this logic these days so might note strange behavior in the attribute mappings from time to time 

Hope it helps.

Diego

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: 范围项目5W2-集团评估使用须知
entry.content:
背景介绍

除法定评估外，您还想要使用集团评估功能。 集团评估提供在不同联营公司之间销售/采购货物和服务的集团能够抵销这些公司之间的利润的功能。

另外，最近发现有正在实施的S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的项目，激活了集团评估的功能，但是后面发现又不需要，配置中也发现了错误，导致不得不对系统进行重置，最后影响项目周期的意外情况。

所以这篇博文目的既是介绍功能，也是提醒慎重选择项目范围。

前提条件

• 客户使用 SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) 作为配置环境。

• 要使用集团评估功能，需要激活范围项目：5W2 - 集团评估

• 为了能够使用 5W2 范围项目，强烈建议您也使用以下范围项目：

o 5HP - 高级公司间库存转储

o 5D2 - 高级公司间销售

o 5MQ - 含已评估在途库存的现货销售

仅当使用这些范围项目并具备相应的专家配置时，您才能将集团评估中的利润抵销用于库存会计核算。

有关详细信息，请参阅以下 SAP Help Portal 文档： 

 (5W2)集团评估

 (5D2)高级公司间销售

 (5HP)高级公司间库存转储

(5MQ)含已评估在途库存的现货销售 

功能限制

为了使用5W2,存在以下这些功能限制：

  1. 为了能够激活 5W2 范围项目，不能激活以下不兼容的范围项目：

传统公司间库存转储范围项目：

  • 1P9 - 公司间库存转储
  • 2TS - 公司间库存转储退货

传统公司间销售范围项目：

  • 1HO - 公司间销售订单处理 - 国内
  • 1MX - 公司间销售订单处理 - 国际
  • 1WO - 扩展公司间销售流程
  • 2F4 - 客户退货的公司间流程

2.常规：

  • 您只能在初始方案范围设定（Initiate Scoping）活动期间激活集团评估，后续拓展方案是无法增加的。
  • 仅当使用 SAP Central Business Configuration 时才能激活集团评估。
  • 所有公司代码都必须分配到新增的集团评估分类账 (4G)。
  • 对于资产会计中税收折旧范围的使用，必须选择并激活附加非主分类账（2L 或 3L）。对于非主分类账，必须在公司代码级别分配本地会计准则。
  • 会计准则：
    • 分类账 4G 不随缺省会计准则一起提供。对于分类账 4G，需要在分类账级别分配公司会计准则。使用将会计准则分配到分类账和公司代码配置活动（标识：103556）执行此操作。在系统中进行任何过账之前，必须完成这些设置。
    • SAP 建议您向主分类账 0L 和并行分类账 4G 分配相同的公司会计准则（IFRS、USGP 或国家/地区特定会计准则）。

3.总账会计：

  • 过账货币调整：不支持包含多个分类账的分类账组中的过账，包括 4G 或分类账组中留空的过账。 在这种情况下，仅在法定分类账或集团评估分类账 (4G) 中过账货币调整。
  • 不支持以下评估运行：

- 重新分组应付账款/应收账款

- 执行进一步评估

- 执行外币评估；请改用高级外币评估运行。

  • 无法根据集团评估报告交易货币金额。显示的交易货币金额基于法定评估。请注意，这也会影响余额结转。

4.间接费用会计：

  • 集团评估和通用并行会计不支持传统分配功能。因此，主分类账的值将过账到所有分类账。检查是否可以使用通用分配代替，从而支持计算值并将其过账到各个分类账。

5.库存会计：

无法为分类账 4G 运行库存资产负债表评估（分类账 在过滤器中不可用）。由于库存资产负债表评估仅在公司代码级别运行，因此此行为是预期行为。

6.会计核算 - 物流集成：

  • 不支持传统公司间销售订单处理（范围项目 1HO（国内）和 1MX（国际））和公司间库存转储（范围项目 1P9）。这些范围项目无法与范围项目 5W2（集团评估）一起激活。请改用高级公司间业务流程。有关详细信息，请参阅高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储。
  • 高级公司间销售（范围项目 5D2）和高级公司间库存转储（范围项目 5HP）流程支持抵销公司间利润。对于其他公司间流程，抵销过账逻辑不可用。
  • 不支持供应商发票的公司间发票更正和后续借记/贷记。

7.生产会计：

  • 订单计划成本：在按库存生产场景中，不会计算集团评估视图的订单计划成本。 请改为参考主分类账中的计划成本。
  • BEI：基于期间的生产会计（范围项目 BEI）不支持集团评估5W2。它根据主分类账值结算成本对象余额，并将相同的值复制到其他分类账。 如果 3F0 支持您正在运行的生产场景，建议与基于事件的生产会计（范围项目 3F0）一起运行。有关 3F0 的限制，请参阅 SAP Note 3042082。

8.收入和成本会计：

  • 基于事件的收入确认：通常，对于集团评估分类账，基于事件的收入确认的过账逻辑与任何其他非主分类账的过账逻辑相同。
  • 但是，激活高级公司间销售（范围项目 5D2）以及高级公司间库存转储（范围项目 5HP）和组评估（范围项目 5W2）后，集团评估分类账中存在用于收入确认的特定过账逻辑，特别是基于事件的收入确认与现货销售的集成以及相应的收入确认代码 SFS、SFSCCM 和 SFSN。在这些场景中，为确保公司间抵销过账上下文中的过账逻辑正确，开票期间在集团评估分类账中创建的抵销过账不会在实时处理或月末关账期间触发基于事件的收入确认过账。
  • 与法定组 GAAP 分类账相比，无法为集团评估分类账 4G 维护不同的收入确认规则，因为“凭证类型”和“确认码 - 公司代码和会计准则设置”的配置取决于会计准则。

9.跨公司转包：

  • 不支持跨公司代码转包订单。

总结

包括5W2在内的所有的范围项目一旦激活，就无法回撤取消激活，唯一的办法就是重置系统，这会导致系统配置和数据丢失，以及项目周期延长。

所以请务必谨慎根据现有以及未来的业务拓展情况，酌情激活使用，慎之又慎。

附录

  • SAP Note 3093830 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud：集团评估的版本限制
  • SAP Note  3100892 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 中的集团评估

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content:
Hi @andrj111, I fully understand the case you mentioned. But, unfortunately, it's not supported in current solution beacuse that ignore the empty value is designed behavior.

I have raised your requirement to our team product owner. And you can also raise the requriment in customer influence site.

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: 「HANA Disk Usage (GB)」の集計結果に関して、「Used」「Fragmented」「Free」の項目について質問があります。 例えば、systemが「SID_000」の場合、これらのデータはクライアント000で使用されているデータのみを反映していますか。 それとも、systemが「SID_000」であっても、クライアント000だけでなく、クライアント100など他のクライアントで使用されているデータも含む、ディスク全体の「Used」「Fragmented」「Free」の集計結果を示していますか。

entry.title: Tables and Fields for Stock - Multiple Materials module MM.
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to build the data model for "Stock - Multiple Materials".

I really need help finding tables and fields that contain the following fields: Reporting Date, Sales Order, Shelf Life Expiration Date, Supplier Name, and Customer.

I have attached the image below.

Thanks and Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: System Behavior
entry.content: Hi Mr Harshal, thanks for your prompt response and sorry for the delayed reply. I already tried with all the available options under local calculation but i am not getting the required results as posted above.

entry.title: Re: Error Encountered During Status change for Standard C...
entry.content:
Hi RaminS,

Thanks for your feedback.

I totally understand your concern. However, we need to consider the pros and cons in between.

I believe all the participants would like to have a well managed community.

If you look at the existing threads, only very little number of solutions were accepted by the questioner. Most of the time they don't come back.

Our moderation (Help accept the solution) is to ensure the follow-up questions are taken care and it's a kind of closure of the question.

As Vera mentioned, the questioner can unaccept the solution anytime.

You are welcome to provide your better ideas for community question management.

Thanks & Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset?
entry.content:
How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset in the app Manage Fixed Assets?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to bring out the segment value when creating an a...
entry.content:
Based on the standard design of the app:

In the first scenario, when only filling out the cost center, the values for the profit center and segment will be automatically identified. 

In the second scenario, when only filling out profit center, the segment value will also be automatically identified. 

You can refer to the KBA for reference.

3541700 - How to bring out the segment value when creating an asset? - SAP for Me

entry.title: CAP Forbidden error, multiple batch requests - CAP Authorization
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am testing CAP authorization, I have created a role 'VIEWER' and granting read access only to users with this role. I didnt assign this role, but generally we got Forbidden error in one request. I see it is sending multiple batch requests for forbidden and it is never ending.

 @(restrict: [
         {
             grant: 'READ',
             to   : 'Viewer'
         },

entry.title: Re: SOST Mail jons delete
entry.content: hi @RobertoNogueron deleting sost data is not something to overlook. check note 988057 and then, if you are in a rush and working on a sandbox system, you may run RSBCS_REORG  with creation date and status code (for example) 826. cheers!A

entry.title: Purchase Order Cancelled form template in S4HANA system
entry.content:
I would like to know PO cancelled template is available in S4HANA system like SAP ByDesign.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: 「SID_000」の場合、クライアント000で使用されているデータのみを反映します。

entry.title: Re: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in...
entry.content:
For the TECO, which control the production order relevant activities, just for example: Forbitten Goods receipt for production order, Cleaning the reservation for the component, Forbitten Goods issue, Forbitten confirmation, and close the PR for the subcontracting operations ... All the activates which are about the production order, but there no direct relationship with purchasing order.

Since for the components Purchasing relevant activities should be happened before the production, and they are separate processes in SAP. So there is no possible to restrict the purchasing process in BS22, thank you!
